ddls:
CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data was collected */,
  "congressional_district" INTEGER /* Congressional district where the data was collected */,
  "citizen_voting_age_population_estimate" INTEGER /* Citizen voting-age population estimate */,
  "citizen_voting_age_population_margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for citizen voting-age population estimate */,
  "less_than_9th_grade_estimate" INTEGER /* Less than 9th grade estimate */,
  "less_than_9th_grade_margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for less than 9th grade estimate */,
  "less_than_9th_grade_percent_of_total" REAL /* Less than 9th grade percent of total */,
  "less_than_9th_grade_percent_of_total_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for less than 9th grade percent of total */,
  "high_school_graduate_estimate" INTEGER /* High school graduate estimate */,
  "high_school_graduate_margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for high school graduate estimate */,
  "high_school_graduate_percent_of_total" REAL /* High school graduate percent of total */,
  "high_school_graduate_percent_of_total_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for high school graduate percent of total */,
  "some_college_no_degree_estimate" INTEGER /* Some college no degree estimate */,
  "some_college_no_degree_margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for some college no degree estimate */,
  "some_college_no_degree_percent_of_total" REAL /* Some college no degree percent of total */,
  "some_college_no_degree_percent_of_total_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for some college no degree percent of total */,
  "associate_degree_estimate" INTEGER /* Associate degree estimate */,
  "associate_degree_margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for associate degree estimate */,
  "associate_degree_percent_of_total" REAL /* Associate degree percent of total */,
  "associate_degree_percent_of_total_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for associate degree percent of total */,
  "bachelor_degree_estimate" INTEGER /* Bachelor degree estimate */,
  "bachelor_degree_margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for bachelor degree estimate */,
  "bachelor_degree_percent_of_total" REAL /* Bachelor degree percent of total */,
  "bachelor_degree_percent_of_total_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for bachelor degree percent of total */,
  "graduate_degree_estimate" INTEGER /* Graduate degree estimate */,
  "graduate_degree_margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for graduate degree estimate */,
  "graduate_degree_percent_of_total" REAL /* Graduate degree percent of total */,
  "graduate_degree_percent_of_total_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for graduate degree percent of total */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* The method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* The date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* A version number to track changes over time */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* A brief description or notes about the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., federal agency, state agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_congressional_district FOREIGN KEY ("congressional_district") REFERENCES congressional_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* The total population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* The area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* The capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "congressional_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the congressional district is located */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the congressional district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* The total population of the congressional district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* The area of the congressional district in square miles */,
  "district_representative" TEXT /* The name of the representative for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., high school graduate, bachelor's degree) */,
  "education_level_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the education level */,
  "education_level_order" INTEGER /* An order number to sort education levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., estimate, margin of error) */,
  "data_type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
